description: Black and grey round blunt toed shoes, with stitched detail and central lace up fastening Mesh upper with synthetic overlays Reinforced overlay at the toe box and at the heel collar Pull loop at the heel Padded inner and tongue, soft and padded footbed Upper adhered to the outsole Thick rubber outsole extending in front to form a toe guard and at the back to form a heel guard, has multi directional lugs for improved grip and traction Comes with a shoe bag
